packages.name: Calendar
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Core calendar module for Hecos. Stores, displays, and manages time-based events. Provides a shared datetime picker UI component, LLM tools, and REST API for other modules.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

packages.name: Image Generation
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: AI Image Generation — Generates images from text prompts using multiple providers (Pollinations, Gemini, OpenAI DALL-E, Stability AI, HuggingFace). Fully autonomous package with its own TOML configuration.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

packages.name: Lists Manager
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Universal list manager plugin. Supports shopping lists, to-do lists, blacklists, and any other list type with items, priorities, and labels.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

packages.name: Simple Maps
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Simple Map Module based on Leaflet and Nominatim.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

packages.name: Quick Links
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: A user-managed sidebar widget to store and quickly access your favorite links.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

packages.name: Reminder
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Schedule time-based reminders with TTS alerts and WebUI notifications. Supports natural language and recurring CRON expressions.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

packages.name: Voice Visualizer
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Retro-80s voice animation. Shows KITT-style scanner or a pixelated talking mouth when Hecos speaks.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

packages.name: Weather Pro
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Hybrid weather module: AI plugin (current weather + 7-day forecast via Open-Meteo) + sidebar/Control Room widget with live data and daily forecast cards. Fully autonomous package with its own TOML configuration.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

packages.name: Webcam
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Access to PC or Client optical vision to take snapshots. Can use the local server webcam OR trigger the user's own device camera (phone/browser).
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

packages.name: Webcam Feed
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Displays a live webcam feed inside the Hecos Hub sidebar. Uses WebRTC for zero-latency streaming directly from the client device.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.
